CustomField.description: ContentDocumentId of the document released or referenced at this engagement event (e.g., Draft EIS published for public comment). Satisfies CEQ Entity 5 Related Document ID property. ContentDocument cannot be a Lookup target via Metadata API; stored as an 18-char ID reference.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: 18-character Salesforce ContentDocumentId for the document associated with this engagement event.
CustomField.label: Related Document ID
